description: Square slogan graphic with a distressed black texture background. Running diagonally up the right side in large white chalk-style stenciled lettering is a stacked list: 'PEOPLE', 'MONEY', 'PRODUCTS', 'INTELLECTUAL', 'PROPERTY'. At upper-left, white sans-serif text reads 'If it crosses the U.S. border illegally, it's our job to', completed by a bold black-on-orange highlighted box reading 'STOP IT.' An orange and yellow painted X mark is brushed over the lower-left of the list. The bottom-left bears the DHS/ICE seal with 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' in white; the bottom-right shows 'ICE.gov'.
notable_text: If it crosses the U.S. border illegally, it's our job to STOP IT. | PEOPLE MONEY PRODUCTS INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY | ICE.gov
